MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
JOSEPH S. MAY counsel for Plaintiff/Respondent John Anzur.
Joshua N. Kastan counsel for Defendant/Appellant USAA Casualty Insurance Company represented by Steve Livingston.

Hearing is held. The Court recieves a set of exhibits from both sides. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Small Claims Appeals is taken under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Anne Wong, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D525)
